ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! What a start for RR. Jofra Archer is bang on with the length. Hits the deck hard and gets it at an awkward height for Salt
event_info: who gets tangled. Takes his eyes off and the ball takes the leading edge an pops straight to Jurel. Philip Salt couldn't avoid it as the line was right at his body. Has to make a long way back to the pavillion. Phil Salt c Dhruv Jurel b Jofra Archer 0(1)
beats the outside edge. Length delivery angling away outside off; Padikkal plays away from his body and gets beaten
this was more of an edge. Opens the bat face and steers it wide of second slip. Was in the air and runs down to third man fence for four
this is convincing from Padikkal. Short of a length delivery outside off; Padikkal gets under the ball and cuts it over point. Few bounces and over the fence
angled in at the pads; Padikkal gets across and tucks it down to fine leg for a run

edged and flies past diving keeper. Was bowled at 144.3ks on a back of a length. Kohli pokes at it away from his body and the thick edge flies to the right of Jurel's reach. Not sure why Parag removed first slip. Would have gone straight to the slip fielder
Nandre Burger is greeted with a boundary. Just a fraction short and width on offer. Padikkal is in great form to miss out on that. Hops across and cuts it through point region
angling in at the body; Padikkal shuffles and clips it to vacant mid-wicket region
144.6ks length delivery that swings across Kohli. Beats the outside edge through to the keeper
this is bread and butter for Kohli. On middle and Kohli whips it off his pads. Great use of wrists to pick the ball up towards fine leg fence
poor from Burger. Sprayed down leg and the ball moves further down to make it hard for Jurel. Dives to his left; but can't stop cleanly
FOUR; was there bat on that? The umpire signals byes. This cut Kohli in half. Shaped into the right-hander and goes through bat-pad gap. Flew past the off-stump and the keeper had no chance
good length delivery outside off; bunted towards cover for a quick single`

gets it through. Smart from Virat. Waits for the ball and uses the pace to pick the gap behind square on the off-side. No third man and the ball runs away in a hurry despite a diving effort from backward point
good length delivery on off; Kohli gets right behind the line and defends it back to Jofra Archer
another edge and another boundary for RCB. Short on middle; Kohli looks to pull. The ball takes the inside edge and runs down fine. Beats fine leg comfortably for four
repeat of the first ball. The class of Kohli on display. Sees the width and allows the ball to come to the bat. Guides it past short third man and collects four more
knocked to covers for a quick single to a length delivery outside off

ball_event: out Caught by Shimron Hetmyer!! It's high and it is taken brilliantly. Was in the air for a long long time
event_info: Shimron Hetmyer; runs to his right and has to dive forward to hang onto the catch as it was swirling in the air. Padikkal wasn't in a great position to hit this. The ball bounces tad extra and takes the leading edge of Padikkal; who looked to whip it on the on-side. Second wicket for Jofra Archer. Devdutt Padikkal c Shimron Hetmyer b Jofra Archer 14(7) [4s-3]
pushed towards mid-on for a run
good length delivery on off; defended back to Sandeep
angled in on middle and leg; Patidar's bat turns as he tucks it to mid-wicket
good length delivery on middle; bunted down to long-on
inside out and over mid-off. Kohli makes room and hits it up and over. Wasn't an easy shot as the length was on the shortish side. Kohli still hits it with a straight bat
text book cover drive from Kohli. Leans onto the front foot and creams the drive through covers to a half-volley outside off

1 run; loud shout for LBW! Riyan Parag waited till the last second and decides against the review. Patidar goes for the big slog sweep and misses. It looked very close as the ball pings his back leg on middle and leg. Umpire thinks it was going down leg and RR don't review
pushed to the off-side
Kohli tucks it behind square on the on-side
tad shortish in length. Patidar hits it uppishly wide of long-on. Just a single

ball_event: out Bowled!! RCB have lost another one. It's the big wicket of Kohli. He wasn't looking that comfortable today
event_info: yet was scoring at a good pace. He misses a straight delivery. Was more of a you miss; I hit scenario. Kohli goes for the loft and misses it completely. The ball sneaks through bat and pad and he sees the stumps shattered. Virat Kohli b Ravi Bishnoi 32(16) [4s-7]
pushed through on off; defended back to Bishnoi
good length delivery on middle; pushed wide of backward point
back of a length delivery outside off; Krunal cuts it straight to point
banged in short on middle. Krunal looks to upper cut and misses
peach of a delivery. That hits the deck and seams away past the outside edge on a good length. Krunal plays down the wrong line and gets beaten on the outside edge
cuts it wide of point. Krunal's bottom hand comes off his bat as he connects the ball
Patidar drops it to mid-wicket and gets to the other end
Bishnoi goes wide of his crease and darts it in; Patidar bunts it down to long-on

ball_event: out Caught by Shimron Hetmyer!! This is an even better catch than what he took a while ago. This was flat
event_info: was coming hard at it him; Hetmyer dives forward and takes a screamer inches above the ground. Krunal comes down the track early; Bishnoi spots it and bowls the googly away from the left-hander's reach. Krunal goes through with the shot; he gets it off the toe end down to long-off. RCB are losing wickets in cluster. Krunal Pandya c Shimron Hetmyer b Ravi Bishnoi 1(6)
tossed up on off; blocked to cover
Jitesh gets across and clips the leg-break to square leg
half-volley outside off; driven down to long-off
tucked to the on-side. End of another excellent over from Bishnoi. A wicket and four runs coming off it
flatter on middle and leg; tucked to vacant mid-wicket
lovely from Patidar. Gives himself some room and goes inside out over cover. Times the fuller length delivery and hits it one bounce over the fence. Made it look so easy
flatter on middle; driven down to long-on
darted in on middle; Jitesh pushes it back to Jadeja
tucked to the on-side. Jadeja runs across; but can't prevent the single
eased to long-on for a single
creamed through cover for a single
slashed towards third man for a single
slower back of a length delivery on middle; Jitesh whips it to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Lbw!! This keeps a tad low and Jitesh fails to get the bat down in time. He was hanging on the back foot and played across the line. Brijesh caught him off-guard with a faster delivery that skidded through on middle. Hit the back pad and the umpire had his finger up in a flash. Jitesh consults Patidar and decides against a review. RCB lose half their side as the players go into a strategic time-out. Jitesh Sharma lbw b Brijesh Sharma 5(8)
event_info: out Lbw!! This keeps a tad low and Jitesh fails to get the bat down in time. He was hanging on the back foot and played across the line. Brijesh caught him off-guard with a faster delivery that skidded through on middle. Hit the back pad and the umpire had his finger up in a flash. Jitesh consults Patidar and decides against a review. RCB lose half their side as the players go into a strategic time-out. Jitesh Sharma lbw b Brijesh Sharma 5(8)
full toss outside off; David drives it wide of sweeper cover and gets off the mark with a brace
goes for the yorker and misses his line. All David had to do was to get bat on ball. He gets plenty of it and the ball runs away down to fine leg fence
146.1ks half-volley outside off; driven straight to sweeper cover. A slight mis-field from the fielder; but no harm done
Jofra Archer attacks the batter with a length delivery on middle. David drops it in front of cover for a quick single
Patidar closes the bat face early and gets a thick outside edge that runs down to third man to a back of a length delivery on middle
banged in short at the body; David does well to keep it out as the ball was rising steeply
another short delivery at David. He gets on top of the bounce and pulls it over mid-wicket. Wasn't timed well; but has enough legs to reach the fence
back of a length delivery on leg; David backs away and taps it to cover
short and wide outside off; cut to sweeper cover
short delivery outside off; David chops the cut down to long-on off the inside edge
good length delivery angling in; tapped down to long-on
David presents the full face of the bat and hits it down to long-on

1 run; stifled appeal for LBW! Nothing from the umpire and the players don't bother to review. Was clearly sliding down leg. Patidar plays across the line and misses and the ball rolls to the off-side of the pad

ball_event: out Caught by Shimron Hetmyer!! RCB sink further as they lose their previous game hero. Tim David tries to power it over the fence. He doesn't get hold of it
event_info: the length delivery hits the toe end of the bat and goes flat to long-on. Hetmyer takes the catch just inside the boundary rope. Tim David c Shimron Hetmyer b Brijesh Sharma 13(9) [4s-2]
flatter on middle; defended
bunted down to long-on
tossed up and Shepherd is up and going from ball one. Gets under the ball and thumps it straight over long-off. First six of the game comes at 11.3 for RCB
flatter delivery from Bishnoi. tucked to the on-side
Patidar wrists it to vacant mid-wicket
leg-break outside off; driven to sweeper cover
short delivery down the leg; Shepherd gets inside the line of the ball and pulls it down to fine leg. One the bounce to the fielder
hit straight and hit over the bowler's head. Wasn't a bad ball. Patidar stands tall and flat bats it for four
cutter and full on leg-stump; driven down to long-off
133.7ks short delivery outside off; Shepherd waits and cuts it late to pick the gap on the off-side. Through point region for four
back-to-back boundaries for Shepherd. Poor line from Brijesh and pays the price. Sliding down leg; Shepherd waits and flicks it fine. Beats short fine for four
Shepherd knocks it to sweeper cover for a run. Keeps the strike with that single
swept towards deep backward square leg where Archer puts in a dive and saves it; keeps them down to two
touch fuller around off; pushed towards mid-off fora single
fraction short on middle and leg; clipped through the leg-side for one
on a length around off; knocked to long-off for one by Romario Shepherd
swings across the line; gets an inside edge towards square leg

ball_event: out Caught by Brijesh Sharma!! Brijesh Sharma almost made a mess of it. This was a straighter delivery on leg
event_info: Romario Shepherd goes for a sweep and gets a top edge. Brijesh at short fine leg tries to grab it; but the ball pops out of his hands. However; he recovers well enough to take the catch on the second attempt. Jadeja had his heart in his mouth for a moment. RCB in a spot of bother and they have sent Venkatesh Iyer to brave them out of trouble. He is the impact sub for RCB tonight. Romario Shepherd c Brijesh Sharma b Ravindra Jadeja 22(11) [4s-2 6s-1]
back of a length around middle and leg; Rajat Patidar clips it through mid-wicket for one
fraction short on middle and leg; Venkatesh Iyer swings across the line; gets an inside edge towards deep backward square leg
Rajat Patidar playing a captain's knock! This was pitched up by the bowler and Rajat Patidar stood tall and smashed it over long-off for half-a-dozen. RCB need more of these from their skipper
on a length from round the wicket; Rajat Patidar swings and misses

that's a lovely shot! Banged in short from round the wicket; Rajat Patidar gets into a good position and pulls it over deep backward square leg for half-a-dozen. That's the second maximum of the over for the skipper
tad short around off; Rajat Patidar looks to punch this down the ground; gets an inside edge towards the bowler
back of a length outside off; punched to wide long-off for one

that's a sloppy effort by Bishnoi at deep point. This was full and wide outside off; Rajat Patidar drilled it through the off-side and Bishnoi in the deep misfields; gifting away a boundary. Should have stopped it; even he knows that. Quite evident on his face
touch fuller around off; Rajat Patidar lofts it over the infield at covers for a couple of runs
tad short on middle and leg; slower one; Rajat Patidar rides the bounce and pats it down the pitch

Rajat Patidar brings up his fifty! This was pitched up by the bowler and Rajat Patidar creamed it through the gap at covers. There was a fielder sprinting across in the deep; but he could do nothing about it. This was timed and placed pretty well
tad fuller around off; Rajat Patidar drives it towards the fielder at cover
tad short outside off; Venkatesh Iyer carves this through point for one
smashed over the bowler! Tad fuller around off; Rajat Patidar stays put and smokes it right over the bowler's head for a towering six. That's a 90m maximum

back-to-back maximums! Flatter through the air at the stumps; Rajat Patidar stays put and spanks this over deep mid-wicket for yet another six. Parag walks upto Ravi Bishnoi and has a word of advice for him
he goes quicker through the air around off; Rajat Patidar swings hard; but mistimes it towards long-on
played back to the bowler by Venkatesh Iyer; doesn't middle it well enough
that's a fine stop by Jadeja! Width on offer outside off; Venkatesh Iyer slices it through the off-side and the fielder in the deep sprints across and saves a boundary with a prolific effort

ball_event: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! A fine knock by Rajat Patidar comes to an end. This was a cross-seamer on a fuller length
event_info: Rajat Patidar looks to go big. He swings hard and miscues it towards deep mid-wicket. Donovan Ferreira in the deep settles under the skier and makes sure to latch onto it. Sandeep Sharma with a unique celebration as he writes something pointing towards skyward. Rajat Patidar c Donovan Ferreira b Sandeep Sharma 63(40) [4s-4 6s-4]
fired down the leg-side; that's a wide ball by Sandeep Sharma
overthrow. Back of a length outside off; Bhuvneshwar Kumar taps it towards backward point and sets off for a single. He is sent back though and an overthrow at the batsman's end; results in one
almost chopped on! On a length around off; Venkatesh Iyer swings early and gets an inside edge past the stumps. Almost ricocheted onto the stumps this one
length ball on middle and leg; Bhuvneshwar Kumar nudges it towards mid-wicket
drifting on the pads; worked through mid-wicket for a single by Bhuvneshwar Kumar
good length delivery around off; knocked to long-off for a single
on the fuller side as Venkatesh Iyer drives this towards long-on for one
banged in short by Brijesh Sharma outside off; it's a slower bouncer as Bhuvneshwar Kumar ducks underneath
smashed away! Slight width on offer outside off; Bhuvneshwar Kumar makes room and thumps this over covers as the ball races away to the fence
good length delivery around middle and leg; keeps a tad low as Bhuvneshwar Kumar bunts it towards long-on
short and wide outside off; Venkatesh Iyer goes for a cut; miscues it towards the off-side

good running between the wickets. A low full toss by Brijesh Sharma and Bhuvneshwar Kumar swings early. Mistimes it towards deep mid-on and that allows them to come back for two. Hetmyer with a direct-hit at the bowler's end; but Iyer was inside the crease as he dragged his bat with a sprint
cheeky! Good length delivery outside off; Venkatesh Iyer improvises and reverse laps this towards the third man fence. There was a fielder inside the ring; but he could do nothing about it
good length delivery; right into the slot; Venkatesh Iyer stays in the crease and swings it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen. That was a clean strike as it was a 82m maximum
yorker length ball outside off; Venkatesh Iyer looks to swipe this across the line; gets beaten
short and wide outside off; Venkatesh Iyer slaps it over the infield at covers; challenges the fielder's arm and comes back for two
attempts a wide yorker; but misses the tramline outside off. Called a wide by the umpire
on the shorter side; tad slower; Venkatesh Iyer swings across the line early; gets a top edge over square leg. A couple of runs taken

an impactful knock by the Impact sub. He powers this length delivery over long-off and takes RCB past the 200-run mark. That was a really expensive over by Sandeep Sharma; concedes 21 runs in the 20th over
short of a leng5th outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal steers it to short third man
short of a length outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal carves it through backward point to get going

Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is off the mark with a boundary! That's an inswinging yorker from round the wicket and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi brings his bat down in a jiffy and drills it straight past the bowler. Patidar chases it all the way to the boundary and puts in a dive; but fails to stop the boundary
from over the wicket angle; back of a length delivery as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi swings early; getting an inside edge towards mid-wicket
banged in short by Bhuvneshwar Kumar; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi goes for an upper cut and misses

width on offer outside off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi throws the kitchen sink at it. Slashes it powerfully and gets enough elevation to clear the infield. Bounces a couple of times and lobs past the boundary. 9 runs from the opening over for RR

Yashasvi Jaiswal joins the act! Width on offer outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal throws his hands at it and slashes it over deep backward point. Salt in the deep sprints across to his left; but this one clears him comfortably. That's the first maximum of the chase
back of a length around off; Yashasvi Jaiswal pats it down
141.5kph; back of a length outside off; Yashasvi Jaiswal attempts a cut and misses
short of a length outside off; angled away from the batter as Yashasvi Jaiswal plays it on the rise; taps it towards the keeper with soft hands

pulled away! Banged in short by Josh Hazlewood; Yashasvi Jaiswal gets into a good position; rocks back in the crease and pulls it over deep mid-wicket for half-a-dozen. Plenty of RR flags in the stands

ball_event: out Caught by Jitesh Sharma!! Josh Hazlewood has the last laugh! That's a huge wicket as he gets the in-form opener. Short of a length outside off
event_info: a cross-seam delivery and Yashasvi Jaiswal looks to cut it away. That was too close to the body and the outside edge has been taken by the keeper; diving to his left. Josh Hazlewood is back in the playing XI and among the wickets; right in his 1st over. Yashasvi Jaiswal c Jitesh Sharma b Josh Hazlewood 13(8) [6s-2]
good length delivery around leg; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi looks to flick it away; gets hit on the pads though
smashed down the ground! Pitched up by the bowler and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi has drilled it straight past the bowler with a powerful swing of his bat. No need to run for those

and now some luck with him. This was a back of a length delivery outside off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi swings early and the inside edge misses the off-stump; beats the keeper's dive and races away to the fence. Back-to-back boundaries for the flamboyant young opener
length delivery around middle and leg; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi swipes across the line; gets an inside edge through backward square leg
fraction short outside off; Dhruv Jurel chops it over backward point for one

flicked away! Pitched up by the bowler and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flicks it over deep mid-wicket for a maximum. He's playing a video game out there in the middle. Makes batting look so easy and effortless
on a length around off; Dhruv Jurel pats this in front of point and sets off for a single; only to be sent back
back of a length outside off; Dhruv Jurel steers it towards short third man for one
that shaped back in sharply from back of a length; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi plays it late; chopping it towards square third man for a boundary. Adjusted late to chop that away
more runs! On a length around middle and leg; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi stands tall and tonks it over mid-on. On the bounce and over the fence for four runs

make that a hat-trick of boundaries. This was pitched up by the bowler and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi creams it through covers for the third boundary in as many deliveries. When was the last time you saw Josh Hazlewood being treated like that
19 runs from that Josh Hazlewood over! A short ball to end the over as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi pulls it over deep square leg for half-a-dozen. Josh Hazlewood look skywards and starts walking back
driven towards mid-off by Dhruv Jurel for a single
ain't going to spare anyone! Back of a length around off; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi rocks back in the crease and thumps it over wide long-on for a 80m six. RCB bowlers have no answers to this onslaught

fifty off 15 balls! What a rollicking knock this has been. He goes for a pull and gets a top edge towards fine leg. Salt in the deep takes the catch; but he overhauls the boundary eventually. The RR dugout is on its feet; giving him a standing ovation. Jurel gives him a hug
on the fuller side as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi squeezes it towards mid-off
a length delivery around middle and leg; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi knocks it down the pitch

50-run stand up! RR have raced away to 73/1 in 5 overs. This was a short ball outside off and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi slashed it over backward point to end the 5th over with a boundary again. So difficult to contain him. He can play shots all across the park

runs continue to flow. Back of a length delivery around middle and leg; Dhruv Jurel swings early and gets an inside edge towards the fine leg fence. There was a fielder; but inside the circle; nothing much he could do about it
proper shot. Right into the slot; it's a length delivery and Dhruv Jurel picks the bones out of it. Stands tall and pummels it over wide long-on for a flat six
they're making the most of the powerplay. Back of a length delivery outside off; Dhruv Jurel plays it late; carving this through the gap between backward point and short third man
some relief for RCB. A rare dot ball. Was a length ball that was driven to the fielder at cover
that was a gift of a delivery by Abhinandan Singh. Juicy full toss on leg; Dhruv Jurel accepts the full toss with both arms and flicks it over fine leg for a nonchalant six. RR into the 90s already

make that 97 off the powerplay! RCB need a break; reckons Ian Bishop on air. This was a back of a length delivery around middle and leg; Dhruv Jurel drags it through the leg-side and bisects a couple of fielders converging across in the deep
flatter around middle and leg; nudged through mid-wicket for a single
short and punished! Rocks back in the crease and hammers this short ball over mid-wicket. Away to the fence in a jiffy; more runs for RR. 100 up for them
knocked to long-on for one
drifting on the pads; worked through mid-wicket for a single
on the pads; Dhruv Jurel works it through the on-side for one
111 off 7 overs! Unbelievable hitting. This was on the batter's pads and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flicked it over deep square leg for a towering six. Krunal Pandya getting belted as well
no stopping this pair. This was fraction short outside off; Dhruv Jurel rocks back in the crease and cuts it through backward point. Manages to beat the fielder in the deep comfortably
on the pads; Dhruv Jurel clips it through mid-wicket
pushed back to the bowler by Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
100-run stand up! This was on the shorter side; Vaibhav Sooryavanshi rocks back and pulls it over deep mid-wicket and just manages to clear the fielders
loss of words. This is carnage. Was on the pads and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flicked it over deep mid-wicket for yet another six
flatter through the air as Vaibhav Sooryavanshi knocks it to long-on for one. 18 runs from the over

ball_event: out Caught by Virat Kohli!! End of a prolific knock by Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. This was tad short and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flat-bats this towards long-on. Kohli in the deep takes a good low catch and the young opener misses out a well-deserved century. Has got the required run rate down to run-a-ball almost. He walks back to a standing ovation from the spectators and his teammates in the dugout welcome him with a standing ovation too. RR need only 73 runs more off 71 balls. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Virat Kohli b Krunal Pandya 78(26) [4s-8 6s-7]
event_info: out Caught by Virat Kohli!! End of a prolific knock by Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. This was tad short and Vaibhav Sooryavanshi flat-bats this towards long-on. Kohli in the deep takes a good low catch and the young opener misses out a well-deserved century. Has got the required run rate down to run-a-ball almost. He walks back to a standing ovation from the spectators and his teammates in the dugout welcome him with a standing ovation too. RR need only 73 runs more off 71 balls. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi c Virat Kohli b Krunal Pandya 78(26) [4s-8 6s-7]

ball_event: out Caught by Josh Hazlewood!! Two in two for Krunal Pandya. He's on a hat-trick. A slower bouncer by Krunal Pandya outside off and Shimron Hetmyer guides it straight to the fielder at short third man. Shimron Hetmyer has a sorry look on his face. He tries to hide it with a smile. Shimron Hetmyer c Josh Hazlewood b Krunal Pandya 0(1)
event_info: out Caught by Josh Hazlewood!! Two in two for Krunal Pandya. He's on a hat-trick. A slower bouncer by Krunal Pandya outside off and Shimron Hetmyer guides it straight to the fielder at short third man. Shimron Hetmyer has a sorry look on his face. He tries to hide it with a smile. Shimron Hetmyer c Josh Hazlewood b Krunal Pandya 0(1)
flatter through the air on off; knocked to long-off for one
length delivery at the stumps; pushed to long-off for one
a lot slower through the air; Riyan Parag defends it
on the pads; clipped towards the leg-side for one
short of length on off; Riyan Parag goes on the back foot and defends to the mid-on region; easy single as short mid-wicket tries to go to his left and cut it off
short of length and skids on to middle; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot to pull and misses; looks like he is hit on the box. Crouches low and takes time out. A break in play
short of length on the stumps; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep square-leg

ball_event: out Caught by Krunal Pandya!! Another one and RCB are fighting back. It's a short of length delivery on off
event_info: Parag gets forward to loft; lots of bottom-hand but no elevation; good catch as Krunal goes to his right at long-on and takes it well before tumbling. Was the cross-seamer and Hazlewood is all smiles. Riyan Parag c Krunal Pandya b Josh Hazlewood 3(5)
short of length just outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and tucks to deep mid-wicket; placed in front of the fielder and they come back for a quick two
short of length on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on
tossed up full just outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets low and paddles it fine to fine-leg for two
that's the bouncer which surprises everyone. Ravindra Jadeja is quick to go down. Wants a wide; but called as one short delivery for the over
another bouncer and again Ravindra Jadeja ducks; called as the second short delivery of the over
tossed up full on middle; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to drive to the left of Krunal Pandya who dives and parries it wide of short mid-wicket; they steal a quick single
the arm-ball and Krunal Pandya has his hands on his head. Because Dhruv Jurel went back to this middle-stump delivery and tried to cut; did well to get bat and avoid the pad; finds backward point
flat back of a length around off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
short of length on off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and high-elbows the punch to long-on
short of length just outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and punches it back to Bhuvneshwar Kumar; off the thick inside half
short of length and tight on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and high-elbows the punch; finds Bhuvneshwar Kumar
good length on middle and leg; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and tucks it wide of deep mid-wicket; they come back for two
short of length and rising on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and wrists it straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
Bhuvneshwar Kumar follows Ravindra Jadeja outside the leg-stump with a length delivery; he tucks to deep square-leg

luck for Ravindra Jadeja. He is hurried by this quick short of length delivery on off; the thick inside-edge misses the stumps and Hazlewood allows it to go away to the fence as he chases from short fine. Didn't dive or try to sprint after it
flat good length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep mid-wicket
tossed up full on middle; Dhruv Jurel gets forward to drive and gets it widee of long-off; they take two
flat good length outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and mistimes the cut in front of backward point

Krunal Pandya and Ravindra Jadeja have a smile on their faces. Naughty ones too. Was a short delivery and across Jadeja; who tries to reverse-lap it over Jitesh Sharma and the short third man fielder; doesn't connect
short and like a pacer at Ravindra Jadeja; who goes on the back foot to pull and it's a good stop by Romario at deep square-leg; as it bounced in front of him

1 run; short of length and pitches outside the leg-stump; hurries Ravindra Jadeja who is rapped on the pads. Josh Hazlewood is interested and after a chat RCB take the review. Dhruv Jurel calls Jadeja for a quick single and had there been a direct-hit; the latter was in strife. RCB lose the review
beautiful pull. It's short on off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls; splits deep backward square-leg and deep mid-wicket; to perfection. That was kept down and played so well
50 for Dhruv Jurel. It's a good length delivery on middle and leg; Jurel closes the face of the bat and turns it to the vacant square-leg area

direct-hit from Patidar and Ravindra Jadeja had given up. It's a short of length delivery outside off; Jadeja turns it to the right of mid-wicket; Patidar charged in and cut the angle so well; dives forward and under-arms but misses
short of length outside off; Dhruv Jurel is happy to go back and tap it to the mid-wicket area for one
short of length on off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and opens the face of the bat to run it down to third man
full and angling away from the left-hander outside off; Ravindra Jadeja gets forward to drive and the thick inside-edge goes to short fine. Could've so easily gone back on
full outside off; in the slot; Dhruv Jurel gets forward and opens the face of the bat to square-drive so well; well wide of backward point and races away
slower-ball and well wide outside off; left alone and wide taken
thick outside-edge and flies past the dive and the outstretched right hand of Jitesh Sharma. It's a full delivery outside off; Dhruv Jurel gets forward and drives; the outside-edge is found
short of length on off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep backward square-leg
low full-toss outside the leg-stump; Ravindra Jadeja flicks and misses; another wide
short of length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and taps it to the cover-point area
slower-ball on a short of length outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls it down to long-on
short of length on off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
Romario Shepherd round the wicket. It's short of length outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and opens the face of the bat to run it down to third man
slower-ball off-cutter and full just outside off; Dhruv Jurel backs away and drives it to sweeper cover
short around off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and dabs it down to third man
short of length on off; angled in; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and punches it straight down the ground; quick running and two more
short of length around off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
good length and off-pace outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and works it towards deep square-leg; again quick running gives them two
short of length just outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and high-elbows the punch down to long-on
short of length on middle; Ravindra Jadeja nudges it down to long-on; Dhruv Jurel looks like he is cramping up; reaches the other end and falls

full and angling into the right-hander on off; Dhruv Jurel comes down the track and also shuffles across; shows the full face of the bat to drive it straight down the ground; Bethell the sub fumbles and one turns into two
Dhruv Jurel reviews for a non-wide. It's a touch and go call. Full and on the line I think outside off; left alone. It's inside the line and RR lose the review
full and shapes back into off; Dhruv Jurel gets forward and shows the full face of the bat to drive to long-on. Bethell this time keeps it to one
short of length outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
short of length outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and cuts to third man. Shepherd came round the wicket for this one
short of length on off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and pulls to deep mid-wicket
short outside off; Ravindra Jadeja goes on the back foot and upper-cuts down to third man
low full-toss down leg; Dhruv Jurel helps himself to six; flicks and sends it effortlessly over the deep backward square-leg fence. Scores level

RR remain unbeaten and end RCB's winning streak this season. RR have chased 202 with two overs left. It's a short of length delivery outside off; Dhruv Jurel goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on. A strolled single and that will do for RR
